399	    type SendOpenSynIn = (&'a mut TransportLinkUnicast, &'a mut State, SendOpenSynIn);
400	    type SendOpenSynOut = SendOpenSynOut;
401	    async fn send_open_syn(
402	        self,
403	        input: Self::SendOpenSynIn,
404	    ) -> Result<Self::SendOpenSynOut, Self::Error> {
405	        let (link, state, input) = input;
406	
407	        // Extension QoS
408	        let ext_qos = self
409	            .ext_qos
410	            .send_open_syn(&state.transport.ext_qos)
411	            .await
412	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
413	
414	        // Extension Shm
415	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
416	        let ext_shm = match self.ext_shm.as_ref() {
417	            Some(ext_shm) => ext_shm
418	                .send_open_syn(&input.ext_shm)
419	                .await
420	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
421	            None => None,
422	        };
423	
424	        // Extension Auth
425	        let ext_auth = zcondfeat!(
426	            "transport_auth",
427	            self.ext_auth
428	                .send_open_syn(&state.link.ext_auth)
429	                .await
430	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
431	            None
432	        );
433	
434	        // Extension MultiLink
435	        let ext_mlink = zcondfeat!(
436	            "transport_multilink",
437	            self.ext_mlink
438	                .send_open_syn(&state.transport.ext_mlink)
439	                .await
440	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
441	            None
442	        );
443	
444	        // Extension LowLatency
445	        let ext_lowlatency = self
446	            .ext_lowlatency
447	            .send_open_syn(&state.transport.ext_lowlatency)
448	            .await
449	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
450	
451	        // Extension Compression
452	        let ext_compression = zcondfeat!(
453	            "transport_compression",
454	            self.ext_compression
455	                .send_open_syn(&state.link.ext_compression)
456	                .await
457	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
458	            None
459	        );
460	
461	        // Extension RegionName
462	        let region_name = self
463	            .ext_region_name
464	            .send_open_syn(&state.transport.ext_region_name)
465	            .await
466	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
467	
468	        // Extension South
469	        let ext_remote_bound = if let Some(callback) = self.ext_remote_bound.as_ref() {
470	            let p = TransportPeer {
471	                zid: input.other_zid,
472	                whatami: input.other_whatami,
473	                links: vec![zenoh_link_commons::Link::new_unicast(
474	                    &link.link,
475	                    link.config.priorities.clone(),
476	                    link.config.reliability,
477	                )],
478	                is_qos: ext_qos.is_some(),
479	                #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
480	                is_shm: ext_shm.is_some(),
481	                region_name,
482	            };
483	
484	            callback(p)
485	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?
486	                .map(|b| RemoteBound::new(b as u8 as u64))
487	        } else {
488	            None
489	        };
490	
491	        // Build and send an OpenSyn message
492	        let mine_initial_sn =
493	            compute_sn(input.mine_zid, input.other_zid, state.transport.resolution);
494	        let msg: TransportMessage = OpenSyn {
495	            lease: input.mine_lease,
496	            initial_sn: mine_initial_sn,
497	            cookie: input.other_cookie,
498	            ext_qos,
499	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
500	            ext_shm,
501	            ext_auth,
502	            ext_mlink,
503	            ext_lowlatency,
504	            ext_compression,
505	            ext_remote_bound,
506	        }
507	        .into();
508	
509	        let _ = link
510	            .send(&msg)
511	            .await
512	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
513	
514	        tracing::trace!("Establishment Open OpenSyn: {}. Sent: {:?}", link, msg);
515	
516	        let output = SendOpenSynOut {
517	            mine_initial_sn,
518	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
519	            ext_shm: input.ext_shm,
520	        };
521	        Ok(output)
522	    }

524	    type RecvOpenAckIn = (&'a mut TransportLinkUnicast, &'a mut State);
525	    type RecvOpenAckOut = RecvOpenAckOut;
526	    async fn recv_open_ack(
527	        self,
528	        input: Self::RecvOpenAckIn,
529	    ) -> Result<Self::RecvOpenAckOut, Self::Error> {
530	        let (link, state) = input;
531	
532	        let msg = link
533	            .recv()
534	            .await
535	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::INVALID)))?;
536	
537	        tracing::trace!("Establishment Open OpenAck: {}. Received: {:?}", link, msg);
538	
539	        let open_ack = match msg.body {
540	            TransportBody::OpenAck(open_ack) => open_ack,
541	            TransportBody::Close(Close { reason, .. }) => {
542	                let e = zerror!(
543	                    "Received a close message (reason {}) in response to an OpenSyn on: {:?}",
544	                    close::reason_to_str(reason),
545	                    link,
546	                );
547	                match reason {
548	                    close::reason::MAX_LINKS => tracing::debug!("{}", e),
549	                    _ => tracing::error!("{}", e),
550	                }
551	                return Err((e.into(), None));
552	            }
553	            _ => {
554	                let e = zerror!(
555	                    "Received an invalid message in response to an OpenSyn on {}: {:?}",
556	                    link,
557	                    msg.body
558	                );
559	                tracing::error!("{}", e);
560	                return Err((e.into(), Some(close::reason::INVALID)));
561	            }
562	        };
563	
564	        // Extension QoS
565	        self.ext_qos
566	            .recv_open_ack((&mut state.transport.ext_qos, open_ack.ext_qos))
567	            .await
568	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
569	
570	        // Extension Shm
571	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
572	        if let Some(ext) = self.ext_shm.as_ref() {
573	            ext.recv_open_ack((&mut state.transport.ext_shm, open_ack.ext_shm))
574	                .await
575	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?
576	        };
577	
578	        // Extension Auth
579	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
580	        self.ext_auth
581	            .recv_open_ack((&mut state.link.ext_auth, open_ack.ext_auth))
582	            .await
583	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
584	
585	        // Extension MultiLink
586	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
587	        self.ext_mlink
588	            .recv_open_ack((&mut state.transport.ext_mlink, open_ack.ext_mlink))
589	            .await
590	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
591	
592	        // Extension LowLatency
593	        self.ext_lowlatency
594	            .recv_open_ack((&mut state.transport.ext_lowlatency, open_ack.ext_lowlatency))
595	            .await
596	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
597	
598	        // Extension Compression
599	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
600	        self.ext_compression
601	            .recv_open_ack((&mut state.link.ext_compression, open_ack.ext_compression))
602	            .await
603	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
604	
605	        let output = RecvOpenAckOut {
606	            other_bound: match open_ack.ext_remote_bound {
607	                Some(ext) => Some(
608	                    Bound::try_from(ext.value as u8)
609	                        .map_err(|e| (e.into(), Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
610	                ),
611	                None => None,
612	            },
613	            other_initial_sn: open_ack.initial_sn,
614	            other_lease: open_ack.lease,
615	        };
616	        Ok(output)
617	    }
618	}

620	pub(crate) async fn open_link(
621	    endpoint: EndPoint,
622	    link: LinkUnicast,
623	    manager: &TransportManager,
624	    expected_zid: Option<&ZenohIdProto>,
625	) -> ZResult<TransportUnicast> {
626	    let direction = TransportLinkUnicastDirection::Outbound;
627	    let is_streamed = link.is_streamed();
628	    let config = TransportLinkUnicastConfig {
629	        direction,
630	        batch: BatchConfig {
631	            mtu: link.get_mtu(),
632	            is_streamed,
633	            #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
634	            is_compression: false, // Perform the exchange Init/Open exchange with no compression
635	        },
636	        priorities: None,
637	        reliability: None,
638	    };
639	    let mut link_unicast = TransportLinkUnicast::new(link.clone(), config);
640	    let mut fsm = OpenLink {
641	        ext_qos: ext::qos::QoSFsm::new(),
642	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
643	        ext_mlink: manager.state.unicast.multilink.fsm(&manager.prng),
644	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
645	        ext_shm: manager
646	            .state
647	            .shm_context
648	            .as_ref()
649	            .map(|ctx| ext::shm::ShmFsm::new(&ctx.auth)),
650	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
651	        ext_auth: manager.state.unicast.authenticator.fsm(&manager.prng),
652	        ext_lowlatency: ext::lowlatency::LowLatencyFsm::new(),
653	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
654	        ext_compression: ext::compression::CompressionFsm::new(),
655	        ext_patch: ext::patch::PatchFsm::new(),
656	        ext_remote_bound: manager.config.bound_callback.clone(),
657	        ext_region_name: ext::region_name::RegionNameFsm::new(manager.config.region_name.clone()),
658	    };
659	
660	    // Clippy raises a warning because `batch_size::UNICAST` is currently equal to `BatchSize::MAX`.
661	    // However, the current code catches the cases where `batch_size::UNICAST` is different from `BatchSize::MAX`.
662	    #[allow(clippy::unnecessary_min_or_max)]
663	    let batch_size = manager
664	        .config
665	        .batch_size
666	        .min(link_unicast.config.batch.mtu)
667	        .min(batch_size::UNICAST);
668	
669	    let mut state = {
670	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
671	        let mut prng = zasynclock!(manager.prng);
672	
673	        State {
674	            transport: StateTransport {
675	                batch_size,
676	                resolution: manager.config.resolution,
677	                ext_qos: ext::qos::StateOpen::new(manager.config.unicast.is_qos, &endpoint)?,
678	                #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
679	                ext_mlink: manager
680	                    .state
681	                    .unicast
682	                    .multilink
683	                    .open(manager.config.unicast.max_links > 1),
684	                #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
685	                ext_shm: ext::shm::StateOpen::new(),
686	                ext_lowlatency: ext::lowlatency::StateOpen::new(
687	                    manager.config.unicast.is_lowlatency,
688	                ),
689	                ext_patch: ext::patch::StateOpen::new(),
690	                ext_region_name: ext::region_name::StateOpen::new(),
691	            },
692	            #[cfg(any(feature = "transport_auth", feature = "transport_compression"))]
693	            link: StateLink {
694	                #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
695	                ext_auth: manager.state.unicast.authenticator.open(&mut *prng),
696	                #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
697	                ext_compression: ext::compression::StateOpen::new(
698	                    manager.config.unicast.is_compression,
699	                ),
700	            },
701	        }
702	    };
703	
704	    // Init handshake
705	    macro_rules! step {
706	        ($s: expr) => {
707	            match $s {
708	                Ok(output) => output,
709	                Err((e, reason)) => {
710	                    let _ = link_unicast.close(reason).await;
711	                    return Err(e);
712	                }
713	            }
714	        };
715	    }
716	
717	    let isyn_in = SendInitSynIn {
718	        mine_version: manager.config.version,
719	        mine_zid: manager.config.zid,
720	        mine_whatami: manager.config.whatami,
721	    };
722	    step!(
723	        fsm.send_init_syn((&mut link_unicast, &mut state, isyn_in))
724	            .await
725	    );
726	
727	    let iack_out = step!(fsm.recv_init_ack((&mut link_unicast, &mut state)).await);
728	
729	    // Check if the expected_zid matches the peer's ZID
730	    if let Some(zid) = expected_zid {
731	        if &iack_out.other_zid != zid {
732	            let _ = link_unicast.close(Some(close::reason::INVALID)).await;
733	            return Err(zerror!(
734	                "Expected peer ZID {} but received {}",
735	                zid,
736	                iack_out.other_zid
737	            )
738	            .into());
739	        }
740	    }
741	
742	    // Open handshake
743	    let osyn_in = SendOpenSynIn {
744	        mine_zid: manager.config.zid,
745	        other_zid: iack_out.other_zid,
746	        other_whatami: iack_out.other_whatami,
747	        mine_lease: manager.config.unicast.lease,
748	        other_cookie: iack_out.other_cookie,
749	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
750	        ext_shm: iack_out.ext_shm,
751	    };
752	    let osyn_out = step!(
753	        fsm.send_open_syn((&mut link_unicast, &mut state, osyn_in))
754	            .await
755	    );
756	
757	    let oack_out = step!(fsm.recv_open_ack((&mut link_unicast, &mut state)).await);
758	
759	    // Initialize the transport
760	    let config = TransportConfigUnicast {
761	        zid: iack_out.other_zid,
762	        whatami: iack_out.other_whatami,
763	        bound: oack_out.other_bound,
764	        sn_resolution: state.transport.resolution.get(Field::FrameSN),
765	        tx_initial_sn: osyn_out.mine_initial_sn,
766	        is_qos: state.transport.ext_qos.is_qos(),
767	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
768	        multilink: state.transport.ext_mlink.multilink(),
769	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
770	        shm: match state.transport.ext_shm.negotiated_to_use_shm() {
771	            true => osyn_out.ext_shm.map(TransportShmConfig::new),
772	            false => None,
773	        },
774	        is_lowlatency: state.transport.ext_lowlatency.is_lowlatency(),
775	        #[cfg(feature = "auth_usrpwd")]
776	        auth_id: UsrPwdId(None),
777	        patch: state.transport.ext_patch.get(),
778	        region_name: state.transport.ext_region_name.other_region_name(),
779	    };
780	
781	    let o_config = TransportLinkUnicastConfig {
782	        direction,
783	        batch: BatchConfig {
784	            mtu: state.transport.batch_size,
785	            is_streamed,
786	            #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
787	            is_compression: state.link.ext_compression.is_compression(),
788	        },
789	        priorities: state.transport.ext_qos.priorities(),
790	        reliability: state.transport.ext_qos.reliability(),
791	    };
792	    let o_link = link_unicast.reconfigure(o_config);
793	    let s_link = format!("{o_link:?}");
794	    // Handle MixedReliability links
795	    let best_effort_link = match link.0 {
796	        zenoh_link::NewLink::MixedReliability { best_effort, .. } => {
797	            #[allow(clippy::unnecessary_min_or_max)]
798	            let mtu = manager
799	                .config
800	                .batch_size
801	                .min(best_effort.get_mtu())
802	                .min(batch_size::UNICAST);
803	
804	            let o_config = TransportLinkUnicastConfig {
805	                direction,
806	                batch: BatchConfig {
807	                    mtu,
808	                    is_streamed: best_effort.is_streamed(),
809	                    #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
810	                    is_compression: state.link.ext_compression.is_compression(),
811	                },
812	                priorities: state.transport.ext_qos.priorities(),
813	                // Do not apply reliability override to MixedReliability associated links
814	                reliability: None,
815	            };
816	            let link = TransportLinkUnicast::new(LinkUnicast::from(best_effort), o_config);
817	            Some(link)
818	        }
819	        zenoh_link::NewLink::Single(_) => None,
820	    };
821	    let s_best_effort = best_effort_link.as_ref().map(|l| format!("{l:?}"));
822	
823	    let o_link = LinkUnicastWithOpenAck::new(o_link, None, best_effort_link);
824	    let transport = manager
825	        .init_transport_unicast(
826	            config,
827	            o_link,
828	            oack_out.other_initial_sn,
829	            oack_out.other_lease,
830	        )
831	        .await?;
832	
833	    tracing::debug!(
834	        "New transport link opened from {} to {}: {} {}",
835	        manager.config.zid,
836	        iack_out.other_zid,
837	        s_link,
838	        if let Some(s) = s_best_effort {
839	            format!(" with associated link {s}")
840	        } else {
841	            "".into()
842	        }
843	    );
844	
845	    Ok(transport)
846	}
847

aiTitle: Zenoh 传输建连认证与状态机讲义生成

content.content:
1	//
2	// Copyright (c) 2022 ZettaScale Technology
3	//
4	// This program and the accompanying materials are made available under the
5	// terms of the Eclipse Public License 2.0 which is available at
6	// http://www.eclipse.org/legal/epl-2.0, or the Apache License, Version 2.0
7	// which is available at https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.
8	//
9	// SPDX-License-Identifier: EPL-2.0 OR Apache-2.0
10	//
11	// Contributors:
12	//   ZettaScale Zenoh Team, <zenoh@zettascale.tech>
13	//
14	use std::time::Duration;
15	
16	use async_trait::async_trait;
17	use rand::Rng;
18	use tokio::sync::Mutex;
19	use zenoh_buffers::{reader::HasReader, writer::HasWriter, ZSlice};
20	use zenoh_codec::{RCodec, WCodec, Zenoh080};
21	use zenoh_core::{zasynclock, zcondfeat, zerror};
22	use zenoh_crypto::{BlockCipher, PseudoRng};
23	use zenoh_link::LinkUnicast;
24	use zenoh_protocol::{
25	    core::{Bound, Field, Resolution, WhatAmI, ZenohIdProto},
26	    transport::{
27	        batch_size,
28	        close::{self, Close},
29	        open::ext::RemoteBound,
30	        BatchSize, InitAck, OpenAck, TransportBody, TransportMessage, TransportSn,
31	    },
32	};
33	use zenoh_result::ZResult;
34	
35	#[cfg(feature = "auth_usrpwd")]
36	use super::ext::auth::UsrPwdId;
37	#[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
38	use super::ext::shm::AuthSegment;
39	#[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
40	use crate::shm::TransportShmConfig;
41	use crate::{
42	    common::batch::BatchConfig,
43	    unicast::{
44	        establishment::{compute_sn, ext, AcceptFsm, Cookie, Zenoh080Cookie},
45	        link::{
46	            LinkUnicastWithOpenAck, TransportLinkUnicast, TransportLinkUnicastConfig,
47	            TransportLinkUnicastDirection,
48	        },
49	        TransportConfigUnicast,
50	    },
51	    RemoteBoundCallback, TransportManager, TransportPeer,
52	};
53	
54	pub(super) type AcceptError = (zenoh_result::Error, Option<u8>);
55	
56	struct StateTransport {
57	    batch_size: BatchSize,
58	    resolution: Resolution,
59	    ext_qos: ext::qos::StateAccept,
60	    #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
61	    ext_mlink: ext::multilink::StateAccept,
62	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
63	    ext_shm: ext::shm::StateAccept,
64	    ext_lowlatency: ext::lowlatency::StateAccept,
65	    ext_patch: ext::patch::StateAccept,
66	    ext_region_name: ext::region_name::StateAccept,
67	}
68	
69	#[cfg(any(feature = "transport_auth", feature = "transport_compression"))]
70	struct StateLink {
71	    #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
72	    ext_auth: ext::auth::StateAccept,
73	    #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
74	    ext_compression: ext::compression::StateAccept,
75	}
76	
77	struct State {
78	    transport: StateTransport,
79	    #[cfg(any(feature = "transport_auth", feature = "transport_compression"))]
80	    link: StateLink,
81	}
82	
83	// InitSyn
84	struct RecvInitSynIn {
85	    mine_version: u8,
86	}
87	struct RecvInitSynOut {
88	    other_zid: ZenohIdProto,
89	    other_whatami: WhatAmI,
90	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
91	    ext_shm: Option<AuthSegment>,
92	}
93	
94	// InitAck
95	struct SendInitAckIn {
96	    mine_version: u8,
97	    mine_zid: ZenohIdProto,
98	    mine_whatami: WhatAmI,
99	    other_zid: ZenohIdProto,
100	    other_whatami: WhatAmI,
101	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
102	    ext_shm: Option<AuthSegment>,
103	}
104	struct SendInitAckOut {
105	    cookie_nonce: u64,
106	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
107	    ext_shm: Option<AuthSegment>,
108	}
109	
110	// OpenSyn
111	struct RecvOpenSynIn {
112	    cookie_nonce: u64,
113	}
114	struct RecvOpenSynOut {
115	    other_zid: ZenohIdProto,
116	    other_whatami: WhatAmI,
117	    other_bound: Option<Bound>,
118	    other_lease: Duration,
119	    other_initial_sn: TransportSn,
120	    #[cfg(feature = "auth_usrpwd")]
121	    other_auth_id: UsrPwdId,
122	}
123	
124	// OpenAck
125	struct SendOpenAckIn {
126	    mine_zid: ZenohIdProto,
127	    mine_lease: Duration,
128	    other_zid: ZenohIdProto,
129	    other_whatami: WhatAmI,
130	}
131	struct SendOpenAckOut {
132	    open_ack: OpenAck,
133	}
134	
135	// Fsm
136	struct AcceptLink<'a> {
137	    link: &'a mut TransportLinkUnicast,
138	    prng: &'a Mutex<PseudoRng>,
139	    cipher: &'a BlockCipher,
140	    ext_qos: ext::qos::QoSFsm<'a>,
141	    #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
142	    ext_mlink: ext::multilink::MultiLinkFsm<'a>,
143	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
144	    // Will be None if SHM operation is disabled by Config
145	    ext_shm: Option<ext::shm::ShmFsm<'a>>,
146	    #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
147	    ext_auth: ext::auth::AuthFsm<'a>,
148	    ext_lowlatency: ext::lowlatency::LowLatencyFsm<'a>,
149	    #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
150	    ext_compression: ext::compression::CompressionFsm<'a>,
151	    ext_patch: ext::patch::PatchFsm<'a>,
152	    ext_remote_bound: Option<RemoteBoundCallback>,
153	    ext_region_name: ext::region_name::RegionNameFsm,
154	}
155	
156	#[async_trait]
157	impl<'a, 'b: 'a> AcceptFsm for &'a mut AcceptLink<'b> {
158	    type Error = AcceptError;
159	
160	    type RecvInitSynIn = (&'a mut State, RecvInitSynIn);
161	    type RecvInitSynOut = RecvInitSynOut;
162	    async fn recv_init_syn(
163	        self,
164	        input: Self::RecvInitSynIn,
165	    ) -> Result<Self::RecvInitSynOut, Self::Error> {
166	        let (state, input) = input;
167	
168	        let msg = self
169	            .link
170	            .recv()
171	            .await
172	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::INVALID)))?;
173	
174	        tracing::trace!(
175	            "Establishment Accept InitSyn: {}. Received: {:?}",
176	            self.link,
177	            msg
178	        );
179	
180	        let init_syn = match msg.body {
181	            TransportBody::InitSyn(init_syn) => init_syn,
182	            _ => {
183	                let e = zerror!(
184	                    "Received invalid message instead of an InitSyn on {}: {:?}",
185	                    self.link,
186	                    msg.body
187	                );
188	                return Err((e.into(), Some(close::reason::INVALID)));
189	            }
190	        };
191	
192	        // Check if the version is supported
193	        if init_syn.version != input.mine_version {
194	            let e = zerror!(
195	                "Rejecting InitSyn on {} because of unsupported Zenoh protocol version (expected: {}, received: {}) from: {}",
196	                self.link,
197	                input.mine_version,
198	                init_syn.version,
199	                init_syn.zid,
200	            );
201	            return Err((e.into(), Some(close::reason::INVALID)));
202	        }
203	
204	        // Compute the minimum SN resolution
205	        state.transport.resolution = {
206	            let mut res = Resolution::default();
207	
208	            // Frame SN
209	            let i_fsn_res = init_syn.resolution.get(Field::FrameSN);
210	            let m_fsn_res = state.transport.resolution.get(Field::FrameSN);
211	            res.set(Field::FrameSN, i_fsn_res.min(m_fsn_res));
212	
213	            // Request ID
214	            let i_rid_res = init_syn.resolution.get(Field::RequestID);
215	            let m_rid_res = state.transport.resolution.get(Field::RequestID);
216	            res.set(Field::RequestID, i_rid_res.min(m_rid_res));
217	
218	            res
219	        };
220	
221	        // Compute the minimum batch size
222	        // Clippy raises a warning because `batch_size::UNICAST` is currently equal to `BatchSize::MAX`.
223	        // However, the current code catches the cases where `batch_size::UNICAST` is different from `BatchSize::MAX`.
224	        #[allow(clippy::unnecessary_min_or_max)]
225	        {
226	            state.transport.batch_size = state
227	                .transport
228	                .batch_size
229	                .min(init_syn.batch_size)
230	                .min(batch_size::UNICAST);
231	        }
232	
233	        // Extension QoS
234	        self.ext_qos
235	            .recv_init_syn((
236	                &mut state.transport.ext_qos,
237	                (init_syn.ext_qos, init_syn.ext_qos_link),
238	            ))
239	            .await
240	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
241	
242	        // Extension Shm
243	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
244	        let ext_shm = match &self.ext_shm {
245	            Some(my_shm) => my_shm
246	                .recv_init_syn(init_syn.ext_shm)
247	                .await
248	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
249	            _ => None,
250	        };
251	
252	        // Extension Auth
253	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
254	        self.ext_auth
255	            .recv_init_syn((&mut state.link.ext_auth, init_syn.ext_auth))
256	            .await
257	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
258	
259	        // Extension MultiLink
260	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
261	        self.ext_mlink
262	            .recv_init_syn((&mut state.transport.ext_mlink, init_syn.ext_mlink))
263	            .await
264	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
265	
266	        // Extension LowLatency
267	        self.ext_lowlatency
268	            .recv_init_syn((&mut state.transport.ext_lowlatency, init_syn.ext_lowlatency))
269	            .await
270	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
271	
272	        // Extension Compression
273	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
274	        self.ext_compression
275	            .recv_init_syn((&mut state.link.ext_compression, init_syn.ext_compression))
276	            .await
277	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
278	
279	        // Extension Patch
280	        self.ext_patch
281	            .recv_init_syn((&mut state.transport.ext_patch, init_syn.ext_patch))
282	            .await
283	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
284	
285	        // Extension RegionName
286	        self.ext_region_name
287	            .recv_init_syn((
288	                &mut state.transport.ext_region_name,
289	                init_syn.ext_region_name,
290	            ))
291	            .await
292	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
293	
294	        let output = RecvInitSynOut {
295	            other_zid: init_syn.zid,
296	            other_whatami: init_syn.whatami,
297	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
298	            ext_shm,
299	        };
300	        Ok(output)
301	    }
302	
303	    type SendInitAckIn = (State, SendInitAckIn);
304	    type SendInitAckOut = SendInitAckOut;
305	    async fn send_init_ack(
306	        self,
307	        input: Self::SendInitAckIn,
308	    ) -> Result<Self::SendInitAckOut, Self::Error> {
309	        #[allow(unused_mut)] // Required for "shared-memory" feature
310	        let (mut state, input) = input;
311	
312	        // Extension QoS
313	        let (ext_qos, ext_qos_link) = self
314	            .ext_qos
315	            .send_init_ack(&state.transport.ext_qos)
316	            .await
317	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
318	
319	        // Extension Shm
320	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
321	        let ext_shm = match self.ext_shm.as_ref() {
322	            Some(my_shm) => my_shm
323	                .send_init_ack(&input.ext_shm)
324	                .await
325	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
326	            _ => None,
327	        };
328	
329	        // Extension Auth
330	        let ext_auth = zcondfeat!(
331	            "transport_auth",
332	            self.ext_auth
333	                .send_init_ack(&state.link.ext_auth)
334	                .await
335	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
336	            None
337	        );
338	
339	        // Extension MultiLink
340	        let ext_mlink = zcondfeat!(
341	            "transport_multilink",
342	            self.ext_mlink
343	                .send_init_ack(&state.transport.ext_mlink)
344	                .await
345	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
346	            None
347	        );
348	
349	        // Extension LowLatency
350	        let ext_lowlatency = self
351	            .ext_lowlatency
352	            .send_init_ack(&state.transport.ext_lowlatency)
353	            .await
354	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
355	
356	        // Extension Compression
357	        let ext_compression = zcondfeat!(
358	            "transport_compression",
359	            self.ext_compression
360	                .send_init_ack(&state.link.ext_compression)
361	                .await
362	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
363	            None
364	        );
365	
366	        // Extension Patch
367	        let ext_patch = self
368	            .ext_patch
369	            .send_init_ack(&state.transport.ext_patch)
370	            .await
371	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
372	
373	        // Extension RegionName
374	        let ext_region_name = self
375	            .ext_region_name
376	            .send_init_ack(&state.transport.ext_region_name)
377	            .await
378	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
379	
380	        // Create the cookie
381	        let (cookie, cookie_nonce): (ZSlice, u64) = {
382	            let mut prng = zasynclock!(self.prng);
383	
384	            let nonce: u64 = prng.gen();
385	            let cookie = Cookie {
386	                zid: input.other_zid,
387	                whatami: input.other_whatami,
388	                resolution: state.transport.resolution,
389	                batch_size: state.transport.batch_size,
390	                nonce,
391	                ext_qos: state.transport.ext_qos,
392	                #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
393	                ext_mlink: state.transport.ext_mlink,
394	                #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
395	                ext_shm: state.transport.ext_shm,
396	                #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
397	                ext_auth: state.link.ext_auth,
398	                ext_lowlatency: state.transport.ext_lowlatency,
399	                #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
400	                ext_compression: state.link.ext_compression,
401	                ext_patch: state.transport.ext_patch,
402	                ext_region_name: state.transport.ext_region_name,
403	            };
404	
405	            let mut encrypted = vec![];
406	            let mut writer = encrypted.writer();
407	            let mut codec = Zenoh080Cookie {
408	                prng: &mut prng,
409	                cipher: self.cipher,
410	                codec: Zenoh080::new(),
411	            };
412	            codec.write(&mut writer, &cookie).map_err(|_| {
413	                (
414	                    zerror!("Encoding cookie failed").into(),
415	                    Some(close::reason::INVALID),
416	                )
417	            })?;
418	            (encrypted.into(), nonce)
419	        };
420	
421	        // Send the message on the link
422	        let msg: TransportMessage = InitAck {
423	            version: input.mine_version,
424	            whatami: input.mine_whatami,
425	            zid: input.mine_zid,
426	            resolution: state.transport.resolution,
427	            batch_size: state.transport.batch_size,
428	            cookie,
429	            ext_qos,
430	            ext_qos_link,
431	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
432	            ext_shm,
433	            ext_auth,
434	            ext_mlink,
435	            ext_lowlatency,
436	            ext_compression,
437	            ext_patch,
438	            ext_region_name,
439	        }
440	        .into();
441	
442	        let _ = self
443	            .link
444	            .send(&msg)
445	            .await
446	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
447	
448	        tracing::trace!(
449	            "Establishment Accept InitAck: {}. Sent: {:?}",
450	            self.link,
451	            msg
452	        );
453	
454	        let output = SendInitAckOut {
455	            cookie_nonce,
456	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
457	            ext_shm: input.ext_shm,
458	        };
459	        Ok(output)
460	    }

462	    type RecvOpenSynIn = RecvOpenSynIn;
463	    type RecvOpenSynOut = (State, RecvOpenSynOut);
464	    async fn recv_open_syn(
465	        self,
466	        input: Self::RecvOpenSynIn,
467	    ) -> Result<Self::RecvOpenSynOut, Self::Error> {
468	        let msg = self
469	            .link
470	            .recv()
471	            .await
472	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::INVALID)))?;
473	
474	        tracing::trace!(
475	            "Establishment Accept OpenSyn: {}. Received: {:?}",
476	            self.link,
477	            msg
478	        );
479	
480	        let open_syn = match msg.body {
481	            TransportBody::OpenSyn(open_syn) => open_syn,
482	            TransportBody::Close(Close { reason, .. }) => {
483	                let e = zerror!(
484	                    "Received a close message (reason {}) instead of an OpenSyn on: {:?}",
485	                    close::reason_to_str(reason),
486	                    self.link,
487	                );
488	                match reason {
489	                    close::reason::MAX_LINKS => tracing::debug!("{}", e),
490	                    _ => tracing::error!("{}", e),
491	                }
492	                return Err((e.into(), Some(reason)));
493	            }
494	            _ => {
495	                let e = zerror!(
496	                    "Received invalid message instead of an OpenSyn on {}: {:?}",
497	                    self.link,
498	                    msg.body
499	                );
500	                tracing::error!("{}", e);
501	                return Err((e.into(), Some(close::reason::INVALID)));
502	            }
503	        };
504	        let encrypted = open_syn.cookie.to_vec();
505	
506	        // Decrypt the cookie with the cipher
507	        let cookie: Cookie = {
508	            let mut prng = zasynclock!(self.prng);
509	            let mut codec = Zenoh080Cookie {
510	                prng: &mut prng,
511	                cipher: self.cipher,
512	                codec: Zenoh080::new(),
513	            };
514	            let mut reader = encrypted.reader();
515	            codec.read(&mut reader).map_err(|_| {
516	                (
517	                    zerror!("Decoding cookie failed").into(),
518	                    Some(close::reason::INVALID),
519	                )
520	            })
521	        }?;
522	
523	        // Verify that the cookie is the one we sent
524	        if input.cookie_nonce != cookie.nonce {
525	            let e = zerror!("Rejecting OpenSyn on: {}. Unknown cookie.", self.link);
526	            return Err((e.into(), Some(close::reason::INVALID)));
527	        }
528	
529	        // Rebuild the state from the cookie
530	        let mut state = State {
531	            transport: StateTransport {
532	                batch_size: cookie.batch_size,
533	                resolution: cookie.resolution,
534	                ext_qos: cookie.ext_qos,
535	                #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
536	                ext_mlink: cookie.ext_mlink,
537	                #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
538	                ext_shm: cookie.ext_shm,
539	                ext_lowlatency: cookie.ext_lowlatency,
540	                ext_patch: cookie.ext_patch,
541	                ext_region_name: cookie.ext_region_name,
542	            },
543	            #[cfg(any(feature = "transport_auth", feature = "transport_compression"))]
544	            link: StateLink {
545	                #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
546	                ext_auth: cookie.ext_auth,
547	                #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
548	                ext_compression: cookie.ext_compression,
549	            },
550	        };
551	
552	        // Extension QoS
553	        self.ext_qos
554	            .recv_open_syn((&mut state.transport.ext_qos, open_syn.ext_qos))
555	            .await
556	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
557	
558	        // Extension Shm
559	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
560	        if let Some(my_shm) = self.ext_shm.as_ref() {
561	            my_shm
562	                .recv_open_syn((&mut state.transport.ext_shm, open_syn.ext_shm))
563	                .await
564	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
565	        }
566	
567	        // Extension Auth
568	        #[cfg(feature = "auth_usrpwd")]
569	        let user_password_id = self
570	            .ext_auth
571	            .recv_open_syn((&mut state.link.ext_auth, open_syn.ext_auth))
572	            .await
573	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?
574	            .auth_id;
575	
576	        // Extension MultiLink
577	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
578	        self.ext_mlink
579	            .recv_open_syn((&mut state.transport.ext_mlink, open_syn.ext_mlink))
580	            .await
581	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
582	
583	        // Extension LowLatency
584	        self.ext_lowlatency
585	            .recv_open_syn((&mut state.transport.ext_lowlatency, open_syn.ext_lowlatency))
586	            .await
587	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
588	
589	        // Extension Compression
590	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
591	        self.ext_compression
592	            .recv_open_syn((&mut state.link.ext_compression, open_syn.ext_compression))
593	            .await
594	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
595	
596	        let output = RecvOpenSynOut {
597	            other_zid: cookie.zid,
598	            other_whatami: cookie.whatami,
599	            other_bound: match open_syn.ext_remote_bound {
600	                Some(ext) => Some(
601	                    Bound::try_from(ext.value as u8)
602	                        .map_err(|e| (e.into(), Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
603	                ),
604	                None => None,
605	            },
606	            other_lease: open_syn.lease,
607	            other_initial_sn: open_syn.initial_sn,
608	            #[cfg(feature = "auth_usrpwd")]
609	            other_auth_id: user_password_id,
610	        };
611	        Ok((state, output))
612	    }

614	    type SendOpenAckIn = (&'a mut State, SendOpenAckIn);
615	    type SendOpenAckOut = SendOpenAckOut;
616	    async fn send_open_ack(
617	        self,
618	        input: Self::SendOpenAckIn,
619	    ) -> Result<Self::SendOpenAckOut, Self::Error> {
620	        let (state, input) = input;
621	
622	        // Extension QoS
623	        let ext_qos = self
624	            .ext_qos
625	            .send_open_ack(&state.transport.ext_qos)
626	            .await
627	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
628	
629	        // Extension LowLatency
630	        let ext_lowlatency = self
631	            .ext_lowlatency
632	            .send_open_ack(&state.transport.ext_lowlatency)
633	            .await
634	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
635	
636	        // Extension Shm
637	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
638	        let ext_shm = match self.ext_shm.as_ref() {
639	            Some(my_shm) => my_shm
640	                .send_open_ack(&state.transport.ext_shm)
641	                .await
642	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
643	            None => None,
644	        };
645	
646	        // Extension Auth
647	        let ext_auth = zcondfeat!(
648	            "transport_auth",
649	            self.ext_auth
650	                .send_open_ack(&state.link.ext_auth)
651	                .await
652	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
653	            None
654	        );
655	
656	        // Extension MultiLink
657	        let ext_mlink = zcondfeat!(
658	            "transport_multilink",
659	            self.ext_mlink
660	                .send_open_ack(&state.transport.ext_mlink)
661	                .await
662	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
663	            None
664	        );
665	
666	        // Extension Compression
667	        let ext_compression = zcondfeat!(
668	            "transport_compression",
669	            self.ext_compression
670	                .send_open_ack(&state.link.ext_compression)
671	                .await
672	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?,
673	            None
674	        );
675	
676	        // Extension RegionName
677	        let region_name = self
678	            .ext_region_name
679	            .send_open_ack(&state.transport.ext_region_name)
680	            .await
681	            .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?;
682	
683	        // Extension South
684	        let ext_remote_bound = if let Some(callback) = self.ext_remote_bound.as_ref() {
685	            let p = TransportPeer {
686	                zid: input.other_zid,
687	                whatami: input.other_whatami,
688	                links: vec![zenoh_link_commons::Link::new_unicast(
689	                    &self.link.link,
690	                    self.link.config.priorities.clone(),
691	                    self.link.config.reliability,
692	                )],
693	                is_qos: ext_qos.is_some(),
694	                #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
695	                is_shm: ext_shm.is_some(),
696	                region_name,
697	            };
698	
699	            callback(p)
700	                .map_err(|e| (e, Some(close::reason::GENERIC)))?
701	                .map(|b| RemoteBound::new(b as u8 as u64))
702	        } else {
703	            None
704	        };
705	
706	        // Build OpenAck message
707	        let mine_initial_sn =
708	            compute_sn(input.mine_zid, input.other_zid, state.transport.resolution);
709	        let msg = OpenAck {
710	            lease: input.mine_lease,
711	            initial_sn: mine_initial_sn,
712	            ext_qos,
713	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
714	            ext_shm,
715	            ext_auth,
716	            ext_mlink,
717	            ext_lowlatency,
718	            ext_compression,
719	            ext_remote_bound,
720	        };
721	
722	        // Do not send the OpenAck right now since we might still incur in MAX_LINKS error
723	        tracing::trace!(
724	            "Establishment Accept OpenAck: {}. Sent: {:?}",
725	            self.link,
726	            msg
727	        );
728	
729	        let output = SendOpenAckOut { open_ack: msg };
730	        Ok(output)
731	    }
732	}

734	pub(crate) async fn accept_link(link: LinkUnicast, manager: &TransportManager) -> ZResult<()> {
735	    let endpoint = link.get_src().to_endpoint();
736	    let direction = TransportLinkUnicastDirection::Inbound;
737	    let mtu = link.get_mtu();
738	    let is_streamed = link.is_streamed();
739	    let config = TransportLinkUnicastConfig {
740	        direction,
741	        batch: BatchConfig {
742	            mtu,
743	            is_streamed,
744	            #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
745	            is_compression: false,
746	        },
747	        priorities: None,
748	        reliability: None,
749	    };
750	    let mut link_unicast = TransportLinkUnicast::new(link.clone(), config);
751	    let mut fsm = AcceptLink {
752	        link: &mut link_unicast,
753	        prng: &manager.prng,
754	        cipher: &manager.cipher,
755	        ext_qos: ext::qos::QoSFsm::new(),
756	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
757	        ext_shm: manager
758	            .state
759	            .shm_context
760	            .as_ref()
761	            .map(|ctx| ext::shm::ShmFsm::new(&ctx.auth)),
762	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
763	        ext_mlink: manager.state.unicast.multilink.fsm(&manager.prng),
764	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
765	        ext_auth: manager.state.unicast.authenticator.fsm(&manager.prng),
766	        ext_lowlatency: ext::lowlatency::LowLatencyFsm::new(),
767	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
768	        ext_compression: ext::compression::CompressionFsm::new(),
769	        ext_patch: ext::patch::PatchFsm::new(),
770	        ext_remote_bound: manager.config.bound_callback.clone(),
771	        ext_region_name: ext::region_name::RegionNameFsm::new(manager.config.region_name.clone()),
772	    };
773	
774	    // Init handshake
775	    macro_rules! step {
776	        ($res:expr) => {
777	            match $res {
778	                Ok(output) => output,
779	                Err((e, reason)) => {
780	                    tracing::debug!("{}", e);
781	                    let _ = link_unicast.close(reason).await;
782	                    return Err(e);
783	                }
784	            }
785	        };
786	    }
787	
788	    // Clippy raises a warning because `batch_size::UNICAST` is currently equal to `BatchSize::MAX`.
789	    // However, the current code catches the cases where `batch_size::UNICAST` is different from `BatchSize::MAX`.
790	    #[allow(clippy::unnecessary_min_or_max)]
791	    let batch_size = manager.config.batch_size.min(batch_size::UNICAST).min(mtu);
792	
793	    let iack_out = {
794	        let mut state = {
795	            #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
796	            let mut prng = zasynclock!(manager.prng);
797	
798	            State {
799	                transport: StateTransport {
800	                    batch_size,
801	                    resolution: manager.config.resolution,
802	                    ext_qos: ext::qos::StateAccept::new(manager.config.unicast.is_qos, &endpoint)?,
803	                    #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
804	                    ext_mlink: manager
805	                        .state
806	                        .unicast
807	                        .multilink
808	                        .accept(manager.config.unicast.max_links > 1),
809	                    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
810	                    ext_shm: ext::shm::StateAccept::new(),
811	                    ext_lowlatency: ext::lowlatency::StateAccept::new(
812	                        manager.config.unicast.is_lowlatency,
813	                    ),
814	                    ext_patch: ext::patch::StateAccept::new(),
815	                    ext_region_name: ext::region_name::StateAccept::new(),
816	                },
817	                #[cfg(any(feature = "transport_auth", feature = "transport_compression"))]
818	                link: StateLink {
819	                    #[cfg(feature = "transport_auth")]
820	                    ext_auth: manager.state.unicast.authenticator.accept(&mut *prng),
821	                    #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
822	                    ext_compression: ext::compression::StateAccept::new(
823	                        manager.config.unicast.is_compression,
824	                    ),
825	                },
826	            }
827	        };
828	
829	        // Let's scope the Init phase in such a way memory is freed by Rust
830	        // after having sent the InitAck. The state will be recovered
831	        // from the Cookie received in the OpenSyn.
832	        let isyn_in = RecvInitSynIn {
833	            mine_version: manager.config.version,
834	        };
835	        let isyn_out = step!(fsm.recv_init_syn((&mut state, isyn_in)).await);
836	
837	        let iack_in = SendInitAckIn {
838	            mine_version: manager.config.version,
839	            mine_zid: manager.config.zid,
840	            mine_whatami: manager.config.whatami,
841	            other_zid: isyn_out.other_zid,
842	            other_whatami: isyn_out.other_whatami,
843	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
844	            ext_shm: isyn_out.ext_shm,
845	        };
846	        step!(fsm.send_init_ack((state, iack_in)).await)
847	    };
848	
849	    // Open handshake
850	    let osyn_in = RecvOpenSynIn {
851	        cookie_nonce: iack_out.cookie_nonce,
852	    };
853	    let (mut state, osyn_out) = step!(fsm.recv_open_syn(osyn_in).await);
854	
855	    // Create the OpenAck but not send it yet
856	    let oack_in = SendOpenAckIn {
857	        mine_zid: manager.config.zid,
858	        mine_lease: manager.config.unicast.lease,
859	        other_zid: osyn_out.other_zid,
860	        other_whatami: osyn_out.other_whatami,
861	    };
862	    let oack_out = step!(fsm.send_open_ack((&mut state, oack_in)).await);
863	
864	    // Initialize the transport
865	    let config = TransportConfigUnicast {
866	        zid: osyn_out.other_zid,
867	        whatami: osyn_out.other_whatami,
868	        bound: osyn_out.other_bound,
869	        sn_resolution: state.transport.resolution.get(Field::FrameSN),
870	        tx_initial_sn: oack_out.open_ack.initial_sn,
871	        is_qos: state.transport.ext_qos.is_qos(),
872	        #[cfg(feature = "transport_multilink")]
873	        multilink: state.transport.ext_mlink.multilink(),
874	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
875	        shm: match state.transport.ext_shm.negotiated_to_use_shm() {
876	            true => iack_out.ext_shm.map(TransportShmConfig::new),
877	            false => None,
878	        },
879	        is_lowlatency: state.transport.ext_lowlatency.is_lowlatency(),
880	        #[cfg(feature = "auth_usrpwd")]
881	        auth_id: osyn_out.other_auth_id,
882	        patch: state.transport.ext_patch.get(),
883	        region_name: state.transport.ext_region_name.other_region_name(),
884	    };
885	
886	    let a_config = TransportLinkUnicastConfig {
887	        direction,
888	        batch: BatchConfig {
889	            mtu: state.transport.batch_size,
890	            is_streamed,
891	            #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
892	            is_compression: state.link.ext_compression.is_compression(),
893	        },
894	        priorities: state.transport.ext_qos.priorities(),
895	        reliability: state.transport.ext_qos.reliability(),
896	    };
897	    let a_link = link_unicast.reconfigure(a_config);
898	    let s_link = format!("{a_link:?}");
899	    // Handle MixedReliability links
900	    let best_effort_link = match link.0 {
901	        zenoh_link::NewLink::MixedReliability { best_effort, .. } => {
902	            #[allow(clippy::unnecessary_min_or_max)]
903	            let mtu = manager
904	                .config
905	                .batch_size
906	                .min(best_effort.get_mtu())
907	                .min(batch_size::UNICAST);
908	
909	            let o_config = TransportLinkUnicastConfig {
910	                direction,
911	                batch: BatchConfig {
912	                    mtu,
913	                    is_streamed: best_effort.is_streamed(),
914	                    #[cfg(feature = "transport_compression")]
915	                    is_compression: state.link.ext_compression.is_compression(),
916	                },
917	                priorities: state.transport.ext_qos.priorities(),
918	                // Do not apply reliability override to MixedReliability associated links
919	                reliability: None,
920	            };
921	            let link = TransportLinkUnicast::new(LinkUnicast::from(best_effort), o_config);
922	            Some(link)
923	        }
924	        zenoh_link::NewLink::Single(_) => None,
925	    };
926	    let s_best_effort = best_effort_link.as_ref().map(|l| format!("{l:?}"));
927	
928	    let a_link = LinkUnicastWithOpenAck::new(a_link, Some(oack_out.open_ack), best_effort_link);
929	    let _transport = manager
930	        .init_transport_unicast(
931	            config,
932	            a_link,
933	            osyn_out.other_initial_sn,
934	            osyn_out.other_lease,
935	        )
936	        .await?;
937	
938	    tracing::debug!(
939	        "New transport link accepted from {} to {}: {} {}",
940	        osyn_out.other_zid,
941	        manager.config.zid,
942	        s_link,
943	        if let Some(s) = s_best_effort {
944	            format!(" with associated link {s}")
945	        } else {
946	            "".into()
947	        }
948	    );
949	
950	    Ok(())
951	}

13	//
14	
15	//! # Init message
16	//!
17	//! The INIT message is sent on a specific Locator to initiate a transport with the zenoh node
18	//! associated with that Locator. The initiator MUST send an INIT message with the A flag set to 0.
19	//! If the corresponding zenohd node deems appropriate to accept the INIT message, the corresponding
20	//! peer MUST reply with an INIT message with the A flag set to 1. Alternatively, it MAY reply with
21	//! a [`super::Close`] message. For convenience, we call [`InitSyn`] and [`InitAck`] an INIT message
22	//! when the A flag is set to 0 and 1, respectively.
23	//!
24	//! The [`InitSyn`]/[`InitAck`] message flow is the following:
25	//!
26	//! ```text
27	//!     A                   B
28	//!     |      INIT SYN     |
29	//!     |------------------>|
30	//!     |                   |
31	//!     |      INIT ACK     |
32	//!     |<------------------|
33	//!     |                   |
34	//! ```
35	//!
36	//! The INIT message structure is defined as follows:
37	//!
38	//! ```text
39	//! Flags:
40	//! - A: Ack            If A==0 then the message is an InitSyn else it is an InitAck
41	//! - S: Size params    If S==1 then size parameters are exchanged
42	//! - Z: Extensions     If Z==1 then zenoh extensions will follow.
43	//!
44	//!  7 6 5 4 3 2 1 0
45	//! +-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
46	//! |Z|S|A|   INIT  |
47	//! +-+-+-+---------+
48	//! |    version    |
49	//! +---------------+
50	//! |zid_len|x|x|wai| (#)(*)
51	//! +-------+-+-+---+
52	//! ~      [u8]     ~ -- ZenohID of the sender of the INIT message
53	//! +---------------+
54	//! |x|x|x|x|rid|fsn| \                -- SN/ID resolution (+)
55	//! +---------------+  | if Flag(S)==1
56	//! |      u16      |  |               -- Batch Size ($)
57	//! |               | /
58	//! +---------------+
59	//! ~    <u8;z16>   ~ -- if Flag(A)==1 -- Cookie
60	//! +---------------+
61	//! ~   [InitExts]  ~ -- if Flag(Z)==1
62	//! +---------------+
63	//!
64	//! If A==1 and S==0 then size parameters are (ie. S flag) are accepted.
65	//!
66	//! (*) WhatAmI. It indicates the role of the zenoh node sending the INIT message.
67	//!    The valid WhatAmI values are:
68	//!    - 0b00: Router
69	//!    - 0b01: Peer
70	//!    - 0b10: Client
71	//!    - 0b11: Reserved
72	//!
73	//! (#) ZID length. It indicates how many bytes are used for the ZenohID bytes.
74	//!     A ZenohID is minimum 1 byte and maximum 16 bytes. Therefore, the actual length is computed as:
75	//!         real_zid_len := 1 + zid_len
76	//!
77	//! (+) Sequence Number/ID resolution. It indicates the resolution and consequently the wire overhead
78	//!     of various SN and ID in Zenoh.
79	//!     - fsn: frame/fragment sequence number resolution. Used in Frame/Fragment messages.
80	//!     - rid: request ID resolution. Used in Request/Response messages.
81	//!     The valid SN/ID resolution values are:
82	//!     - 0b00: 8 bits
83	//!     - 0b01: 16 bits
84	//!     - 0b10: 32 bits
85	//!     - 0b11: 64 bits
86	//!
87	//! ($) Batch Size. It indicates the maximum size of a batch the sender of the INIT message is willing
88	//!     to accept when reading from the network. Default on unicast: 65535.
89	//!
90	//! NOTE: 16 bits (2 bytes) may be prepended to the serialized message indicating the total length
91	//!       in bytes of the message, resulting in the maximum length of a message being 65535 bytes.
92	//!       This is necessary in those stream-oriented transports (e.g., TCP) that do not preserve
93	//!       the boundary of the serialized messages. The length is encoded as little-endian.
94	//!       In any case, the length of a message must not exceed 65535 bytes.
95	//! ```
96	
97	use zenoh_buffers::ZSlice;
98	
99	use crate::{
100	    core::{Resolution, WhatAmI, ZenohIdProto},
101	    transport::BatchSize,
102	};
103	
104	pub mod flag {
105	    pub const A: u8 = 1 << 5; // 0x20 Ack           if A==0 then the message is an InitSyn else it is an InitAck
106	    pub const S: u8 = 1 << 6; // 0x40 Size params   if S==1 then size parameters are exchanged
107	    pub const Z: u8 = 1 << 7; // 0x80 Extensions    if Z==1 then an extension will follow
108	}
109	
110	/// # InitSyn message
111	///
112	/// ```text
113	///  7 6 5 4 3 2 1 0
114	/// +-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
115	/// +---------------+
116	///
117	/// ZExtUnit
118	/// ```
119	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
120	pub struct InitSyn {
121	    pub version: u8,
122	    pub whatami: WhatAmI,
123	    pub zid: ZenohIdProto,
124	    pub resolution: Resolution,
125	    pub batch_size: BatchSize,
126	    pub ext_qos: Option<ext::QoS>,
127	    pub ext_qos_link: Option<ext::QoSLink>,
128	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
129	    pub ext_shm: Option<ext::Shm>,
130	    pub ext_auth: Option<ext::Auth>,
131	    pub ext_mlink: Option<ext::MultiLink>,
132	    pub ext_lowlatency: Option<ext::LowLatency>,
133	    pub ext_compression: Option<ext::Compression>,
134	    pub ext_patch: ext::PatchType,
135	    pub ext_region_name: Option<ext::RegionName>,
136	}
137	
138	// Extensions
139	pub mod ext {
140	    use crate::{zextunit, zextz64, zextzbuf};
141	
142	    /// # QoS extension
143	    /// Used to negotiate the use of QoS
144	    pub type QoS = zextunit!(0x1, false);
145	    pub type QoSLink = zextz64!(0x1, false);
146	
147	    /// # Shm extension
148	    /// Used as challenge for probing shared memory capabilities
149	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
150	    pub type Shm = zextzbuf!(0x2, false);
151	
152	    /// # Auth extension
153	    /// Used as challenge for probing authentication rights
154	    pub type Auth = zextzbuf!(0x3, false);
155	
156	    /// # Multilink extension
157	    /// Used as challenge for probing multilink capabilities
158	    pub type MultiLink = zextzbuf!(0x4, false);
159	
160	    /// # LowLatency extension
161	    /// Used to negotiate the use of lowlatency transport
162	    pub type LowLatency = zextunit!(0x5, false);
163	
164	    /// # Compression extension
165	    /// Used to negotiate the use of compression on the link
166	    pub type Compression = zextunit!(0x6, false);
167	
168	    /// # Patch extension
169	    /// Used to negotiate the patch version of the protocol
170	    /// if not present (or 0), then protocol as released with 1.0.0
171	    /// if >= 1, then fragmentation first/drop markers
172	    pub type Patch = zextz64!(0x7, false);
173	    pub type PatchType = crate::transport::ext::PatchType<{ Patch::ID }>;
174	
175	    /// # RegionName extension
176	    ///
177	    /// See [`crate::core::RegionName`].
178	    pub type RegionName = zextzbuf!(0x8, false);
179	}
180	
181	impl InitSyn {
182	    #[cfg(feature = "test")]
183	    #[doc(hidden)]
184	    pub fn rand() -> Self {
185	        use rand::Rng;
186	
187	        use crate::common::{ZExtUnit, ZExtZ64, ZExtZBuf};
188	
189	        let mut rng = rand::thread_rng();
190	
191	        let version: u8 = rng.gen();
192	        let whatami = WhatAmI::rand();
193	        let zid = ZenohIdProto::default();
194	        let resolution = Resolution::rand();
195	        let batch_size: BatchSize = rng.gen();
196	        let ext_qos = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
197	        let ext_qos_link = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZ64::rand());
198	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
199	        let ext_shm = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
200	        let ext_auth = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
201	        let ext_mlink = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
202	        let ext_lowlatency = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
203	        let ext_compression = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
204	        let ext_patch = ext::PatchType::rand();
205	        let ext_region_name = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
206	
207	        Self {
208	            version,
209	            whatami,
210	            zid,
211	            resolution,
212	            batch_size,
213	            ext_qos,
214	            ext_qos_link,
215	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
216	            ext_shm,
217	            ext_auth,
218	            ext_mlink,
219	            ext_lowlatency,
220	            ext_compression,
221	            ext_patch,
222	            ext_region_name,
223	        }
224	    }
225	}
226	
227	/// # InitAck message
228	///
229	/// ```text
230	///  7 6 5 4 3 2 1 0
231	/// +-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
232	/// ~     nonce     ~
233	/// +---------------+
234	///
235	/// ZExtZ64
236	/// ```
237	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
238	pub struct InitAck {
239	    pub version: u8,
240	    pub whatami: WhatAmI,
241	    pub zid: ZenohIdProto,
242	    pub resolution: Resolution,
243	    pub batch_size: BatchSize,
244	    pub cookie: ZSlice,
245	    pub ext_qos: Option<ext::QoS>,
246	    pub ext_qos_link: Option<ext::QoSLink>,
247	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
248	    pub ext_shm: Option<ext::Shm>,
249	    pub ext_auth: Option<ext::Auth>,
250	    pub ext_mlink: Option<ext::MultiLink>,
251	    pub ext_lowlatency: Option<ext::LowLatency>,
252	    pub ext_compression: Option<ext::Compression>,
253	    pub ext_patch: ext::PatchType,
254	    pub ext_region_name: Option<ext::RegionName>,
255	}
256	
257	impl InitAck {
258	    #[cfg(feature = "test")]
259	    #[doc(hidden)]
260	    pub fn rand() -> Self {
261	        use rand::Rng;
262	
263	        use crate::common::{ZExtUnit, ZExtZ64, ZExtZBuf};
264	
265	        let mut rng = rand::thread_rng();
266	
267	        let version: u8 = rng.gen();
268	        let whatami = WhatAmI::rand();
269	        let zid = ZenohIdProto::default();
270	        let resolution = if rng.gen_bool(0.5) {
271	            Resolution::default()
272	        } else {
273	            Resolution::rand()
274	        };
275	        let batch_size: BatchSize = rng.gen();
276	        let cookie = ZSlice::rand(64);
277	        let ext_qos = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
278	        let ext_qos_link = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZ64::rand());
279	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
280	        let ext_shm = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
281	        let ext_auth = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
282	        let ext_mlink = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
283	        let ext_lowlatency = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
284	        let ext_compression = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
285	        let ext_patch = ext::PatchType::rand();
286	        let ext_region_name = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
287	
288	        Self {
289	            version,
290	            whatami,
291	            zid,
292	            resolution,
293	            batch_size,
294	            cookie,
295	            ext_qos,
296	            ext_qos_link,
297	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
298	            ext_shm,
299	            ext_auth,
300	            ext_mlink,
301	            ext_lowlatency,
302	            ext_compression,
303	            ext_patch,
304	            ext_region_name,
305	        }
306	    }
307	}

14	
15	//! # Open message
16	//!
17	//! After having successfully complete the [`super::InitSyn`]-[`super::InitAck`] message exchange,
18	//! the OPEN message is sent on a link to finalize the initialization of the link and
19	//! associated transport with a zenoh node.
20	//! For convenience, we call [`OpenSyn`] and [`OpenAck`] an OPEN message with the A flag
21	//! is set to 0 and 1, respectively.
22	//!
23	//! The [`OpenSyn`]/[`OpenAck`] message flow is the following:
24	//!
25	//! ```text
26	//!     A                   B
27	//!     |      OPEN SYN     |
28	//!     |------------------>|
29	//!     |                   |
30	//!     |      OPEN ACK     |
31	//!     |<------------------|
32	//!     |                   |
33	//! ```
34	//!
35	//! ```text
36	//! Flags:
37	//! - A: Ack            If A==0 then the message is an OpenSyn else it is an OpenAck
38	//! - T: Lease period   if T==1 then the lease period is in seconds else in milliseconds
39	//! - Z: Extensions     If Z==1 then zenoh extensions will follow.
40	//!
41	//!  7 6 5 4 3 2 1 0
42	//! +-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
43	//! |Z|T|A|   OPEN  |
44	//! +-+-+-+---------+
45	//! %     lease     % -- Lease period of the sender of the OPEN message
46	//! +---------------+
47	//! %  initial_sn   % -- Initial SN proposed by the sender of the OPEN(*)
48	//! +---------------+
49	//! ~    <u8;z16>   ~ if Flag(A)==0 (**) -- Cookie
50	//! +---------------+
51	//! ~   [OpenExts]  ~ if Flag(Z)==1
52	//! +---------------+
53	//!
54	//! (*)     The initial sequence number MUST be compatible with the sequence number resolution agreed in the
55	//!         [`super::InitSyn`]-[`super::InitAck`] message exchange
56	//! (**)    The cookie MUST be the same received in the [`super::InitAck`]from the corresponding zenoh node
57	//! ```
58	//!
59	//! NOTE: 16 bits (2 bytes) may be prepended to the serialized message indicating the total length
60	//!       in bytes of the message, resulting in the maximum length of a message being 65535 bytes.
61	//!       This is necessary in those stream-oriented transports (e.g., TCP) that do not preserve
62	//!       the boundary of the serialized messages. The length is encoded as little-endian.
63	//!       In any case, the length of a message must not exceed 65535 bytes.
64	
65	use core::time::Duration;
66	
67	use zenoh_buffers::ZSlice;
68	
69	use crate::transport::TransportSn;
70	
71	pub mod flag {
72	    pub const A: u8 = 1 << 5; // 0x20 Ack           if A==0 then the message is an InitSyn else it is an InitAck
73	    pub const T: u8 = 1 << 6; // 0x40 Lease period  if T==1 then the lease period is in seconds else in milliseconds
74	    pub const Z: u8 = 1 << 7; // 0x80 Extensions    if Z==1 then an extension will follow
75	}
76	
77	/// # OpenSyn message
78	///
79	/// ```text
80	///  7 6 5 4 3 2 1 0
81	/// +-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
82	/// ~   challenge   ~
83	/// +---------------+
84	/// ```
85	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
86	pub struct OpenSyn {
87	    pub lease: Duration,
88	    pub initial_sn: TransportSn,
89	    pub cookie: ZSlice,
90	    pub ext_qos: Option<ext::QoS>,
91	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
92	    pub ext_shm: Option<ext::Shm>,
93	    pub ext_auth: Option<ext::Auth>,
94	    pub ext_mlink: Option<ext::MultiLinkSyn>,
95	    pub ext_lowlatency: Option<ext::LowLatency>,
96	    pub ext_compression: Option<ext::Compression>,
97	    pub ext_remote_bound: Option<ext::RemoteBound>,
98	}
99	
100	// Extensions
101	pub mod ext {
102	    use crate::{zextunit, zextz64, zextzbuf};
103	
104	    /// # QoS extension
105	    /// Used to negotiate the use of QoS
106	    pub type QoS = zextunit!(0x1, false);
107	
108	    /// # Shm extension
109	    /// Used as challenge for probing shared memory capabilities
110	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
111	    pub type Shm = zextz64!(0x2, false);
112	
113	    /// # Auth extension
114	    /// Used as challenge for probing authentication rights
115	    pub type Auth = zextzbuf!(0x3, false);
116	
117	    /// # Multilink extension
118	    /// Used as challenge for probing multilink capabilities
119	    pub type MultiLinkSyn = zextzbuf!(0x4, false);
120	    pub type MultiLinkAck = zextunit!(0x4, false);
121	
122	    /// # LowLatency extension
123	    /// Used to negotiate the use of lowlatency transport
124	    pub type LowLatency = zextunit!(0x5, false);
125	
126	    /// # Compression extension
127	    /// Used to negotiate the use of compression on the link
128	    pub type Compression = zextunit!(0x6, false);
129	
130	    /// # RemoteBound extension
131	    /// Used to indicate that the remote is on our south bound
132	    pub type RemoteBound = zextz64!(0x7, false);
133	}
134	
135	impl OpenSyn {
136	    #[cfg(feature = "test")]
137	    #[doc(hidden)]
138	    pub fn rand() -> Self {
139	        use rand::Rng;
140	
141	        use crate::common::{ZExtUnit, ZExtZ64, ZExtZBuf};
142	
143	        const MIN: usize = 32;
144	        const MAX: usize = 1_024;
145	
146	        let mut rng = rand::thread_rng();
147	
148	        let lease = if rng.gen_bool(0.5) {
149	            Duration::from_secs(rng.gen())
150	        } else {
151	            Duration::from_millis(rng.gen())
152	        };
153	
154	        let initial_sn: TransportSn = rng.gen();
155	        let cookie = ZSlice::rand(rng.gen_range(MIN..=MAX));
156	        let ext_qos = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
157	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
158	        let ext_shm = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZ64::rand());
159	        let ext_auth = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
160	        let ext_mlink = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
161	        let ext_lowlatency = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
162	        let ext_compression = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
163	        let ext_remote_bound = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZ64::rand());
164	
165	        Self {
166	            lease,
167	            initial_sn,
168	            cookie,
169	            ext_qos,
170	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
171	            ext_shm,
172	            ext_auth,
173	            ext_mlink,
174	            ext_lowlatency,
175	            ext_compression,
176	            ext_remote_bound,
177	        }
178	    }
179	}
180	
181	/// # OpenAck message
182	///
183	/// ```text
184	///  7 6 5 4 3 2 1 0
185	/// +-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
186	/// ~      ack      ~
187	/// +---------------+
188	/// ```
189	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
190	pub struct OpenAck {
191	    pub lease: Duration,
192	    pub initial_sn: TransportSn,
193	    pub ext_qos: Option<ext::QoS>,
194	    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
195	    pub ext_shm: Option<ext::Shm>,
196	    pub ext_auth: Option<ext::Auth>,
197	    pub ext_mlink: Option<ext::MultiLinkAck>,
198	    pub ext_lowlatency: Option<ext::LowLatency>,
199	    pub ext_compression: Option<ext::Compression>,
200	    pub ext_remote_bound: Option<ext::RemoteBound>,
201	}
202	
203	impl OpenAck {
204	    #[cfg(feature = "test")]
205	    #[doc(hidden)]
206	    pub fn rand() -> Self {
207	        use rand::Rng;
208	
209	        use crate::common::{ZExtUnit, ZExtZ64, ZExtZBuf};
210	
211	        let mut rng = rand::thread_rng();
212	
213	        let lease = if rng.gen_bool(0.5) {
214	            Duration::from_secs(rng.gen())
215	        } else {
216	            Duration::from_millis(rng.gen())
217	        };
218	
219	        let initial_sn: TransportSn = rng.gen();
220	        let ext_qos = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
221	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
222	        let ext_shm = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZ64::rand());
223	        let ext_auth = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZBuf::rand());
224	        let ext_mlink = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
225	        let ext_lowlatency = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
226	        let ext_compression = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtUnit::rand());
227	        let ext_remote_bound = rng.gen_bool(0.5).then_some(ZExtZ64::rand());
228	
229	        Self {
230	            lease,
231	            initial_sn,
232	            ext_qos,
233	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
234	            ext_shm,
235	            ext_auth,
236	            ext_mlink,
237	            ext_lowlatency,
238	            ext_compression,
239	            ext_remote_bound,
240	        }
241	    }
242	}

14	
15	pub mod flag {
16	    pub const S: u8 = 1 << 5; // 0x20 Session close if S==1 close the whole session, close only the link otherwise
17	                              // pub const X: u8 = 1 << 6; // 0x40       Reserved
18	    pub const Z: u8 = 1 << 7; // 0x80 Extensions    if Z==1 then an extension will follow
19	}
20	
21	// Reason for the Close message
22	pub mod reason {
23	    pub const GENERIC: u8 = 0x00;
24	    pub const UNSUPPORTED: u8 = 0x01;
25	    pub const INVALID: u8 = 0x02;
26	    pub const MAX_SESSIONS: u8 = 0x03;
27	    pub const MAX_LINKS: u8 = 0x04;
28	    pub const EXPIRED: u8 = 0x05;
29	    pub const UNRESPONSIVE: u8 = 0x06;
30	    pub const CONNECTION_TO_SELF: u8 = 0x07;
31	}
32	
33	pub fn reason_to_str(reason: u8) -> &'static str {
34	    match reason {
35	        reason::GENERIC => "GENERIC",
36	        reason::UNSUPPORTED => "UNSUPPORTED",
37	        reason::INVALID => "INVALID",
38	        reason::MAX_SESSIONS => "MAX_SESSIONS",
39	        reason::MAX_LINKS => "MAX_LINKS",
40	        reason::EXPIRED => "EXPIRED",
41	        reason::UNRESPONSIVE => "UNRESPONSIVE",
42	        reason::CONNECTION_TO_SELF => "CONNECTION_TO_SELF",
43	        _ => "UNKNOWN",
44	    }
45	}
46	
47	/// # Close message
48	///
49	/// The [`Close`] message is sent in any of the following two cases:
50	///     1) in response to an INIT or OPEN message which are not accepted;
51	///     2) at any time to arbitrarily close the transport with the corresponding zenoh node.
52	///
53	/// The [`Close`] message flow is the following:
54	///
55	/// ```text
56	///     A                   B
57	///     |       CLOSE       |
58	///     |------------------>|
59	///     |                   |
60	/// ```
61	///
62	/// The [`Close`] message structure is defined as follows:
63	///
64	/// ```text
65	/// Flags:
66	/// - S: Session close  If S==1 close the whole session, close only the link otherwise
67	/// - X: Reserved
68	/// - Z: Extensions     If Z==1 then zenoh extensions will follow.
69	///
70	///  7 6 5 4 3 2 1 0
71	/// +-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
72	/// |Z|X|S|  CLOSE  |
73	/// +-+-+-+---------+
74	/// |     reason    |
75	/// +---------------+
76	/// ~  [CloseExts]  ~ if Flag(Z)==1
77	/// +---------------+
78	/// ```
79	/// NOTE: 16 bits (2 bytes) may be prepended to the serialized message indicating the total length
80	///       in bytes of the message, resulting in the maximum length of a message being 65535 bytes.
81	///       This is necessary in those stream-oriented transports (e.g., TCP) that do not preserve
82	///       the boundary of the serialized messages. The length is encoded as little-endian.
83	///       In any case, the length of a message must not exceed 65535 bytes.
84	///
85	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
86	pub struct Close {
87	    pub reason: u8,
88	    pub session: bool,
89	}
90	
91	impl Close {
92	    #[cfg(feature = "test")]
93	    #[doc(hidden)]
94	    pub fn rand() -> Self {
95	        use rand::Rng;
96	
97	        let mut rng = rand::thread_rng();
98	
99	        let reason: u8 = rng.gen();
100	        let session = rng.gen_bool(0.5);
101	
102	        Self { reason, session }
103	    }
104	}
105
